findings.comment: HUMAN DECISION REQUIRED: final review round confirms prior blocking finding remains unresolved and no worktree-visible human deferral covers it. Read-SelfLeakDenyList still accepts every non-empty schema_version instead of enforcing supported version 1.0, and tests/unit/self-leak-lint.tests.ps1 still asserts presence only, with no unknown-version exit-2 abuse test. Stop the autonomous review/fix loop; a human must decide whether to require the version lock and paired test now or record an approved deferral in a worktree-visible decision artifact naming where the work is carried.
